shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before midnight, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 3am. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 67. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
